item.title: There ya go! 🤪 Ran into this nice jolly character of a fellow, prior to this he had just mentioned that a bike must get a lot of attention from girls - which led me to this clarification for him. I may have miss-spoken slightly here hehe. @insta360 offici
item.description: There ya go! 🤪 Ran into this nice jolly character of a fellow, prior to this he had just mentioned that a bike must get a lot of attention from girls - which led me to this clarification for him. I may have miss-spoken slightly here hehe. @insta360 offici
item.author: motobreww

item.title: Polite Gents & Mr Brew > Just did a short local ride to grab some stuff quick, wasn’t expecting to get spotted - little guys made my day. @insta360 official @insta360motorcycling #polite #manners #wholesome #bikelife #insta360
